description: Pending research dispatches. Each topic spawns N parallel subagents (one per dimension). Status: pending | in_progress | done. Run via `node scripts/run-dispatch.mjs --slug <slug>` or `--next` for first pending.

dimensions.name: Hats Protocol Tree Architecture
dimensions.focus: How treeId 226 (ZAO governance on Optimism) is structured. What hats exist, who admin-mints, the parent-child role flow. ERC-1155 non-transferable specifics.

dimensions.name: ZAO Governance Usage of Hats
dimensions.focus: Which ZAO roles are gated by hat ownership. How role checks integrate into ZOE, Hermes, Bonfire, BetterCallZaal. The Optimism vs Base split for ZAO governance vs ZABAL Games event NFTs.

dimensions.name: ZABAL Games Finisher + Champion NFT Plan
dimensions.focus: The plan to mint Finisher NFTs to all Finalists and Champion NFTs to top-3 via Hats on Base. Cost per mint, batch minting, who issues, how it ties to POIDH proof submission.

dimensions.name: Hats Tooling + SDK
dimensions.focus: @hatsprotocol/sdk-v1-core usage patterns, the Hats UI app at app.hatsprotocol.xyz, the modules registry (eligibility, toggle, claims). What ZAO uses today vs what is on the roadmap.

topics.name: ArDrive + AR.IO Permanent Storage for ZAO Music

dimensions.name: ArDrive CLI vs Web App
dimensions.focus: When ZAO uses ArDrive CLI vs the web app. Bulk upload patterns for music masters + cover art. AR.IO gateway pricing 2026.

dimensions.name: Music Master Upload Pipeline
dimensions.focus: Exact flow for uploading a finalized track (WAV master + stems + cover + metadata) to Arweave via ArDrive. ANS-104 manifests. How the upload txid becomes a permaweb URL.

dimensions.name: Cost Per GB + AR Token Funding
dimensions.focus: Current AR token price + USD-per-GB for music masters. How BCZ Strategies funds the storage (treasury wallet, recurring top-up, sponsor model).

dimensions.name: Integration With DistroKid + 0xSplits
dimensions.focus: Does the Arweave upload happen BEFORE or AFTER DistroKid distribution? How does the permaweb URL get referenced in the on-chain Creator Fund split records via 0xSplits?

dimensions.name: Scoring Methodology
dimensions.focus: How Talent Protocol's Builder Score is computed vs Quotient's PageRank-variant. Inputs, weights, refresh cadence. What kind of behavior each rewards.

dimensions.name: Empire Builder Booster Integration
dimensions.focus: Which reputation booster type Empire Builder V3 supports for each (TALENT_PROTOCOL vs QUOTIENT). Multiplier formula differences. Examples of empires using each.

dimensions.name: Which Fits The ZAO Better
dimensions.focus: ZAO is Farcaster-native music community. Quotient measures Farcaster engagement; Talent Protocol is broader builder reputation. Which signal matters more for ZAO contributor ranking? Recommendation.

topics.name: BMI MLC DistroKid 0xSplits Music Rights Pipeline

dimensions.name: Registration Order
dimensions.focus: Exact order: BMI publisher registration -> MLC songwriter affiliation -> DistroKid upload -> ISWC + ISRC issuance -> 0xSplits creator fund deployment. Why this order matters.

dimensions.name: 0xSplits Architecture for ZAO Music
dimensions.focus: How a per-release split is deployed on Base. Who gets what percentage (artist, producer, ZAO treasury, BCZ Strategies as publisher). Updating splits after release.

dimensions.name: On-Chain Creator Fund Mechanic
dimensions.focus: The 25% middleman replacement claim - what specifically is replaced. How streaming royalties flow back through 0xSplits. Current implementation vs aspirational.

dimensions.name: Why Skip CD Baby Post-UMG Acquisition
dimensions.focus: UMG's acquisition of CD Baby. Why DistroKid is the chosen distributor now. What was lost in the transition. Alternatives considered (DistroKid Musician Plus vs Pro plan).

dimensions.name: $TIP Token Mechanics
dimensions.focus: Contract address (if deployed), chain, supply, distribution mechanism. How ZOE bot's /tip command routes value. Is it a real token or a virtual ledger entry?

dimensions.name: ZOLs (ZAO contribution credits)
dimensions.focus: What ZOLs are. How they accrue (per contribution type). Where they're recorded (Supabase table, on-chain attestation, or both). How they convert to ZABAL distribution (if at all).

dimensions.name: Three-Token Reconciliation
dimensions.focus: $TIP, ZOLs, $ZABAL all exist. Are they distinct value layers or overlapping? When does a contributor get which? Should they collapse?

dimensions.name: Music Infra Tools
dimensions.focus: DistroKid, BMI, MLC, 0xSplits, ArDrive, AR.IO, FireWavez. Per-tool: cost, auth, where ZAO uses it, integration point in our stack.

dimensions.name: Agent Infra Tools
dimensions.focus: Claude Code Max, Ollama, Anthropic API, OpenRouter, Bonfire, Hermes, ZOE. Per-tool: cost tier, auth method, what it powers in ZAO.

dimensions.name: Ops Infra Tools
dimensions.focus: Lu.ma, Cal.com, Magnetic, Telegram, Farcaster, X Spaces, Riverside, Descript. Per-tool: cost, how it integrates with the agent stack.

dimensions.name: Crypto Infra Tools
dimensions.focus: Helius (Solana), Alchemy (Base/ETH), Coinflow, x402, Empire Builder, Clanker, Hats Protocol, POIDH. Per-tool: chain, fee, integration.

dimensions.name: Lu.ma API Capabilities
dimensions.focus: Lu.ma's API: creating events programmatically, attendee list pulls, calendar sync. Required auth. ZAO's existing Lu.ma calendar URL if known.

dimensions.name: Cal.com API + Webhook Patterns
dimensions.focus: Cal.com booking webhooks, event types, integration with Telegram + Farcaster notifications.

dimensions.name: ZABAL Games Calendar Flow
dimensions.focus: How a workshop lead (e.g. Tyler/Magnetic) becomes a scheduled event. The end-to-end: lead submitted -> approved -> Cal.com booking link sent -> Lu.ma event created -> RSVPs collected -> Farcaster cast announces.

topics.name: SongJam X-Scraper to Empire Builder Migration

dimensions.name: Old X Scraper Architecture
dimensions.focus: How SongJam's X scraper worked before the Empire Builder migration. Rate limits, breakage points, the trigger for the move.

dimensions.name: New Empire Builder Flow
dimensions.focus: How SongJam scores feed Empire Builder via apiLeaderboards. Multiple leaderboard slots (Season 1, Season 2 Ep1, Ep2). What inputs to outputs.

dimensions.name: SANG Token Utility in The Stack
dimensions.focus: SANG as SongJam's native token. How it's earned (via leaderboard?), how spent, how it boosts $ZABAL. The 250k SANG stake minimum mentioned in ZABAL Empire docs.
